name: GOLFTEC Winston-Salem
address: 3382 Frontis St Suite C-3, Winston-Salem, NC 27103
about: GOLFTEC Winston-Salem is a data-driven golf instruction facility offering personalized lessons, club fitting, and practice sessions. The venue utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise swing feedback and improvement plans. Services range from beginner swing evaluations to advanced club fitting, with coaches developing customized strategies for each golfer's goals. The facility focuses on accelerated improvement through a combination of expert coaching and technology-based feedback.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology and launch monitors
Personalized improvement plans with certified PGA coaches
Comprehensive club fitting with data-driven optimization
Access to simulator bays for realistic practice environments

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or rent equipment from the facility. Club rentals are available for lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted. The facility does not offer food or beverage services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole simulator sessions typically take 2-3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and youth coaching, making it suitable for young golfers looking to improve their skills.
